items.title: [正面] Didn't expect to enjoy this game as much as i did,...
items.summary: Didn't expect to enjoy this game as much as i did, the atmosphere and story telling is really good. especially for a gacha game, would definitively recommend it

items.title: [正面] The textbook definition of a hidden gem (with some...
items.summary:
The textbook definition of a hidden gem (with some minor caveats). There is no denying it is a gacha game, so your milage may vary on how much you enjoy/tolerate the genre. Though, compared to many gacha it is very "f2p friendly" as you will still be able to obtain a bunch of awakeners (characters) very quickly by simply playing. The second caveat is that a proper English translation is still underway to replace earlier awkward machine translations.

Aside from that the plot is intriguing, the art is fantastic, and I can't say enough good things about the overall atmosphere. The gameplay is essentially Slay the Spire so if you love that I guarantee you'll love this.
